calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jak Steven Marquez, Esq. for plaintiff Dalt Hotel, LP with property manager, Teresa Flores present.
Andrea K. Anapolsky & Jyan Ferng appearing on limited scope representation for defendant, David Swain, who is also present.

This cause came on regularly this date for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. Case settled. Parties entered into a signed Stipulation for Entry of Judgment & Settlement Agreement. Settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 34 Turk Street, #233, San Francisco, CA.

JPT Andy Westley, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (218)
